calendar.matters:
Specially Set Hearing Re: Reissued Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name Filed By Petitioner Yaeger Micah Rosenberg.
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Yaeger Micah Rosenberg was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Yaeger Mica Moravia St. Victor.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Yaeger Micah Rosenberg was present in pro per, but did not publish the proposed name once a week for four consecutive weeks as required by law. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to October 24, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. for a specially set hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
